replacements.anchorHint: end of the pi self-update branch, immediately after Updated ${APP_NAME}
replacements.newText:
console.log(chalk.green(`Updated ${APP_NAME}`));
                    try { (await import("node:child_process")).spawnSync("pi-patcher", ["reconcile", "--after-update"], { stdio: "inherit", shell: process.platform === "win32" }); } catch {}
